stemHtml: If a crew are trained for LVO (Low Visibility Operations), what might differ in the MEL (Minimum Equipment List) for operations outside LVO?

options.a: Some items might be within the constraints of the MEL for VMC or IMC, but not approved for low visibility operations.
options.b: MEL differences only apply during severe weather conditions.
options.c: MEL constraints do not affect LVO-trained crew in non-LVO operations.
options.d: The MEL applies identically to all operational scenarios, including LVO and non-LVO.
